message:
fix(freeze): sync vstack after call instructions

Call instructions (emitCall, emitCallMethod, emitCallConstructor)
place results on the real stack but were not updating the vstack
to track the result expression.

This caused subsequent operations like get_field to vpop() stale
values, leading to undefined access when the call result was
expected.

Fix: After each call type places result on stack, properly sync
vstack by:
1. Clearing consumed entries (func, this, args) with vpop()
2. Pushing result expression "stack[sp - 1]" with vpush()

Also adds debug comment for disabling frozen functions in testing.

Note: This fix is for codegen correctness. The current tsc runtime
error appears to be in QuickJS runtime (same error with frozen
functions disabled), which needs separate investigation.
